test_sufficiency_summary: The remediated BattleSim live GUI tests now explicitly prove the concrete dialog identities and parent linkage for the Local Game launch chain, retain FBattleScreen lifecycle assertions, and restore shown top-level windows to the pre-launch baseline.
documentation_accuracy_summary: AGENTS.md and doc/DesignNotes.md now accurately describe the stronger class-identity assertions, parent linkage, FBattleScreen lifecycle accounting, and final shown-top-level cleanup behavior covered by the remediated tests.
